Key/Notes:
Need: need based waivers offered, outside of LSAC fee waivers

Merit: waivers offered based on CRS or other merit system

Service: waivers offered based on some form of service. Ex: military, Teach for America, Peace Corps., etc.

Undergrad: waivers offered to the school's undergraduate students who apply

Notes:
Some schools welcome requests, others don't. If you have any knowledge about schools, please leave a comment.

Some schools only send CAS waivers if they're solicited, these are obviously harder to research. If you have any knowledge about these, please leave a comment!

Just because a category of waiver is not listed, doesn't mean the school doesn't provide them. Schools change their policies all the time and don't always advertise who they grant waivers to.
